name: Engram
focus: v0.1.4 published to npm (Feb 27). Fresh install test passed — 2 critical bugs fixed (package size 67MB→388KB, global install crash). Agent framework committed but not pushed. Next: M1 MacBook real hardware test (Feb 28), then content marketing push.
description: Personal AI infrastructure — the bridge between domain expertise and AI power. Audience: Domain Translators. Engram authors skills, OpenClaw runs them, Vouch verifies them.
